signup_connectOsu_description: Click below to sign in with your osu! account
signup_discord_description: Linking your Discord account allows you to receive tournament notifications and communicate with other players.
signup_timezone_description: Select your timezone to help schedule tournament matches at convenient times.
signup_errors_discordLinkFailed: Failed to link Discord. Please try again.
signup_errors_timezoneSaveFailed: Failed to save timezone. Please try again.
tournamentCreate_description: Set up tournament details, rules, and integrations.
tournamentCreate_fields_screeningAppeala: Rejected players can submit a screening appeal.
tournamentCreate_hints_idLocked: ID is synced to the tournament name.
tournamentCreate_hints_idUnlocked: ID is editable. Lock again to resync from the name.
tournamentCreate_errors_acronymTooLong: Acronym must be {max} characters or less.
tournamentCreate_errors_invalidRendition: Rendition must be a positive integer.
tournamentCreate_errors_invalidDateRange: End date must be on or after start date.
tournamentCreate_errors_invalidTeamSize: Team size must be a positive integer.
tournamentCreate_errors_invalidLobbySize: Lobby size must be a positive integer.
tournamentCreate_errors_lobbySizeTooSmal: Lobby size must be at least as large as team size.
tournamentCreate_errors_createFailed: Failed to create tournament. Please try again.
tournamentCreate_errors_idInUse: This ID is already in use. Please choose a different one.
tournamentCreate_errors_mediaUploadFaile: Tournament created, but the banner or icon could not be attached. You can retry later.
tournamentCreate_errors_settingsFailed: Failed to save rank and screening settings. Please try again.
tournamentCreate_placeholders_descriptio: A short summary of the tournament.
tournamentCreate_rankAndScreening_descri: Configure team size and eligibility checks.
tournamentCreate_discord_optional: This step is optional and can be configured later.
tournamentCreate_media_bannerHint: Optional tournament banner displayed on the tournament page.
tournamentCreate_help_id: Unique URL-safe identifier for this tournament. Locked mode keeps it synced with the name.
tournamentCreate_help_name: Primary public name shown to users.
tournamentCreate_help_acronym: Short code used in overlays and compact views. Up to 6 characters if provided.
tournamentCreate_help_rendition: Edition number, e.g. 1, 2. This can also be the year of the tournament, e.g. 2026
tournamentCreate_help_description: Short summary for tournament listings and overview pages.
tournamentCreate_help_endDate: Tournament end date. Must be the same day or later than start date.
tournamentCreate_help_lobbySize: Maximum number of teams in a match lobby. Must be at least as large as team size.
tournamentCreate_help_allowedCountries: Optional comma-separated 2-letter country codes (for example: US, CA, GB). Leave empty to allow all countries.
tournamentCreate_help_useBws: Badge Weighted Seeding adjusts team seedings based on tournament badges. Recommended for major events.
tournamentCreate_help_minimumBadges: Minimum number of tournament badges required for BWS seeding consideration.
tournamentCreate_help_bwsExponent: Base exponent in BWS formula: seed = rank ^ (base ^ (badges ^ 2)). Default 0.9937 is the standard. Higher values = stronger badge impact.
tournamentPage_descriptionFallback: Tournament details will appear here as the event staff continue setting things up.
tournamentPage_customContentEmpty: No custom tournament page content has been published yet.
tournamentDashboard_description: Staff-only controls for tournament operations and tournament page customization.
tournamentDashboard_roles_description: Visible cards adapt to your staff roles.
tournamentDashboard_customization_descri: Edit the markdown, font, and theme tokens for the public tournament page.
tournamentDashboard_gfx_frontPageDescrip: Edit the public tournament page copy in a dedicated GFX workspace.
tournamentDashboard_gfx_themeDescription: Tune typography, radius, and theme tokens for the public page using the shared app palette.
tournamentDashboard_field_themeJsonDescr: Store shadcn-style theme tokens as JSON. Leave blank to use the default site theme.
tournamentDashboard_openPageDescription: Review the current public rendering in a separate tab.
tournamentDashboard_markdownPlaceholder: Write the tournament story, rules, schedule notes, staff credits, and anything else you want on the public page.
tournamentDashboard_dropImages: Drop images here to upload them and insert markdown links.
tournamentDashboard_emptyHint: Markdown, headings, tables, links, and uploaded images are supported.
tournamentDashboard_error_invalidThemeJs: Theme JSON is invalid. Please fix it before saving.
tournamentDashboard_error_saveFailed: Failed to save tournament page settings.
tournamentDashboard_error_uploadFailed: Failed to upload one or more images.
tournamentDashboard_operations_descripti: Staffing distribution for broadcast and match-day roles.
tournamentDashboard_eligibility_descript: A quick read on screening settings and player constraints.
tournamentDashboard_customizationCoverag: Tracks which parts of the public tournament page have been configured.
tournamentDashboard_overview_primaryDesc: A compact summary of staffing balance and public-page readiness for the event.
tournamentDashboard_overview_coverageDes: Shows how much of the public-facing page has been configured.
tournamentDashboard_pooling_description: This page is reserved for map pool work, playtest coordination, and pool-specific checkpoints.
tournamentDashboard_pooling_footnote: The route, tab visibility, and permission boundary are already in place so pooling tools can be added without changing the dashboard shell.
tournamentDashboard_settings_description: Administrative configuration now has its own host/admin surface instead of sharing space with public-page editing.
tournamentDashboard_settings_footnote: This page is intentionally isolated so future settings work can stay tightly scoped and permissioned.
tournamentDashboard_themeTokens_descript: Pick only the colors you want to override.
common_clickToUploadOrDragAndDrop: Click to upload or drag and drop
common_dragAndDropOrClickToChooseFile: Drag and drop, or click to choose a file
common_invalidFileTypeImageJpegPngWebp: Invalid file type. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
common_fileTooLargeMaximumSize: File is too large. Maximum size is {size}.
common_imageUploadFailed: Failed to upload image. Please try again.
